go-task-runner.summary: A CLI tool to run JSON-defined tasks with simple interval scheduling, designed for small homelab workflows.
facts: It simplifies the execution of repetitive tasks and provides a simple way to schedule them.
Runs JSON-defined tasks with interval scheduling
Supports dry-run mode to preview tasks without execution
Uses Go's exec package to execute tasks
Schedules tasks using a simple tick function
